raw_block:
Descended from Abraham —Isa 51:2;Joh 8:39.
Divided into twelve tribes —Ge 35:22;49:28.
Called
  Hebrews. —Ge 14:13;40:15;2Co 11:22.
  Israelites. —Ex 9:7;Jos 3:17.
  Seed of Abraham. —Ps 105:6;Isa 41:8.
  Seed of Jacob. —Jer 33:26.
  Seed of Israel. —1Ch 16:13.
  Children of Jacob. —1Ch 16:13.
  Children of Israel. —Ge 50:25;Isa 27:12.
  Jeshurun. —De 32:15.
Chosen and loved by God —De 7:6,7.
Circumcised in token of their covenant relation —Ge 17:10,11;Ac 7:8.
Separated from all other nations —Ex 33:16;Le 20:24;1Ki 8:53.
Described as
  A peculiar people. —De 14:2.
  A peculiar treasure. —Ex 19:5;Ps 135:4.
  A holy nation. —Ex 19:6.
  A holy people. —De 7:6;14:21.
  A kingdom of priests. —Ex 19:6.
  A special people. —De 7:6.
  The Lord’s portion. —De 32:9.
Sojourned in Egypt —Ex 12:40,41.
Brought out of Egypt by God —Ex 12:42;De 5:15;6:12.
In the desert forty years —Nu 14:33;Jos 5:6.
Settled in Canaan —Nu 32:18;Jos 14:1-5.
Under the theocracy until the time of Samuel —Ex 19:4-6;1Sa 8

reference_groups.raw_segment: Circumcised in token of their covenant relation —Ge 17:10,11;Ac 7:8.

reference_groups.entry_label: Brought out of Egypt by God —Ex 12:42;De 5:15;6:12.

reference_groups.entry_label: Under the theocracy until the time of Samuel —Ex 19:4-6;1Sa 8:7.
reference_groups.raw_segment: Under the theocracy until the time of Samuel —Ex 19:4-6;1Sa 8:7.

reference_groups.entry_label: Divided into two kingdoms after Solomon —1Ki 11:31,32;12:19,20.
reference_groups.raw_segment: Divided into two kingdoms after Solomon —1Ki 11:31,32;12:19,20.

reference_groups.entry_label: Taken captive to Assyria and Babylon —2Ki 17:32;18:11;24:16;25:11.
reference_groups.raw_segment: Taken captive to Assyria and Babylon —2Ki 17:32;18:11;24:16;25:11.

reference_groups.entry_label: Restored to their own land by Cyrus —Ezr 1:1-4.
reference_groups.raw_segment: Restored to their own land by Cyrus —Ezr 1:1-4.

reference_groups.entry_label: Had a series of prophets to promote national reformation —Jer 7:25;26:4,5;35:15;44:4;Eze 38:17.
reference_groups.raw_segment: Had a series of prophets to promote national reformation —Jer 7:25;26:4,5;35:15;44:4;Eze 38:17.

reference_groups.entry_label: The only people who had knowledge of God —Ps 76:1;1Th 4:5;Ps 48:3;Ro 1:28.
reference_groups.raw_segment: The only people who had knowledge of God —Ps 76:1;1Th 4:5;Ps 48:3;Ro 1:28.

reference_groups.entry_label: The only people who worshipped God —Ex 5:17;Ps 96:5;115:3,4;Joh 4:22.
reference_groups.raw_segment: The only people who worshipped God —Ex 5:17;Ps 96:5;115:3,4;Joh 4:22.

reference_groups.entry_label: Religion of, according to rites prescribed by God —Le 18:4;De 12:8-11;Heb 9:1.
reference_groups.raw_segment: Religion of, according to rites prescribed by God —Le 18:4;De 12:8-11;Heb 9:1.

reference_groups.entry_label: Trusted to their privileges for salvation —Jer 7:4;Mt 3:9.
reference_groups.raw_segment: Trusted to their privileges for salvation —Jer 7:4;Mt 3:9.

reference_groups.entry_label: Degenerated as they increased in national greatness —Am 6:4.
reference_groups.raw_segment: Degenerated as they increased in national greatness —Am 6:4.

reference_groups.entry_label: Often displeased God by their sins —Nu 25:3;De 32:16;1Ki 16:2;Isa 1:4;5:24,25.
reference_groups.raw_segment: Often displeased God by their sins —Nu 25:3;De 32:16;1Ki 16:2;Isa 1:4;5:24,25.

reference_groups.entry_label: A spiritual seed of true believers always among —1Ki 19:18;Isa 6:13;Ro 9:6,7;11:1,5.
reference_groups.raw_segment: A spiritual seed of true believers always among —1Ki 19:18;Isa 6:13;Ro 9:6,7;11:1,5.

reference_groups.entry_label: Enemies of, obliged to acknowledge them as divinely protected —Jos 2:9-11;Es 6:13.
reference_groups.raw_segment: Enemies of, obliged to acknowledge them as divinely protected —Jos 2:9-11;Es 6:13.

reference_groups.entry_label: Condemned for associating with other nations —Jdj 2:1-3;Jer 2:18.
reference_groups.raw_segment: Condemned for associating with other nations —Jdj 2:1-3;Jer 2:18.

reference_groups.entry_label: Gentiles made one with, under the gospel —Ac 10:15,28;15:8,9;Ga 3:28;Eph 2:14-16.
reference_groups.raw_segment: Gentiles made one with, under the gospel —Ac 10:15,28;15:8,9;Ga 3:28;Eph 2:14-16.

reference_groups.entry_label: None hated or oppressed, with impunity —Ps 137:8,9;Eze 25:15,16;35:6;Ob 1:10-16.
reference_groups.raw_segment: None hated or oppressed, with impunity —Ps 137:8,9;Eze 25:15,16;35:6;Ob 1:10-16.

reference_groups.entry_label: Imprecated the blood of Christ upon themselves and their children —Mt 27:25.
reference_groups.raw_segment: Imprecated the blood of Christ upon themselves and their children —Mt 27:25.

reference_groups.entry_label: Punishment of, for rejecting and killing Christ, illustrated —Mt 21:37-43.
reference_groups.raw_segment: Punishment of, for rejecting and killing Christ, illustrated —Mt 21:37-43.

reference_groups.entry_label: Their country trodden under foot by the Gentiles —De 28:49-52;Lu 21:24.

reference_groups.entry_label: Deprived of civil and religious privileges —Ho 3:4.
